title: discussion-followup.md — archive Q1-Q7 grill-me decision tree
description: Create `discussion-followup.md` in the same folder as the existing `discussion.md` for the fabric-knowledge-pivot analysis session. Document the full Q1-Q7 grill-me decision tree: each question gets options enumerated, recommendation with rationale, and a 'LOCKED' marker indicating user confirmation. Style and structure must follow the existing `discussion.md` in the same folder (read first for tone reference). This is a doc-only task — no code changes.

files.change: New markdown file documenting Q1-Q7 grill-me decision tree: each Q has Options Considered / Recommendation / Rationale / LOCKED Decision sections; follow tone and structure of sibling discussion.md

implementation: Read `.workflow/.analysis/ANL-2026-05-10-fabric-knowledge-pivot/discussion.md` to absorb tone, heading hierarchy, and section conventions

Draft 7 sections (Q1 Filename / Q2 Pending / Q3 Language / Q4 Topology / Q5 Sync / Q6 Existing-MCP / Q7 New-MCP), each with `### Options Considered`, `### Recommendation`, `### Rationale`, `### LOCKED Decision`
Q1: filename `<id>--<slug>.md`; layer-flip via git mv KT→KP; alternatives = id-only / slug-only / nested dirs
Q2: pending `pending/<type>/<slug>.md`; late-bind id (counter++ on approve); alternatives = eager-bind / temp-id / uuid
Q3: M3 style (EN headings + zh-CN body + EN tech terms); fabric-config `knowledge_language` field; alternatives = full-EN / full-zh / per-entry frontmatter override
Q4: per-type flat; KP mirrors KT; independent counters + meta files; cache rename rule-test.index → .cache/knowledge-test.index; alternatives = nested-by-tag / shared-counter / lazy-meta
Q5: .md authoritative; meta derived; revision = sha256(sorted(stable_id+frontmatter_hash)); 2-phase events; alternatives = meta-authoritative / no-revision / single-phase
Q6: tags into description_index; layer_filter input + default_layer_filter config; redirect_to error shape; near_duplicate diagnostic; ENOENT 1 retry; alternatives = no-filter / hard-error / no-retry

Q7: thin MCP / thick Skill; fab_extract_knowledge semi-thick input; idempotency key (source_session,type,slug); approve via pending_paths[]; layer-flip = modify.layer; defer expiry detected by doctor; docs split data-schema.md + mcp-contracts.md; alternatives = thick-MCP / per-call uuid / separate flip action / single docs file
Word target: ≥ 1500 chars total; verify via `wc -m` on completed file; ensure all 7 'LOCKED' markers present via `grep -c '^LOCKED:' file | awk '$1 == 7'` or similar
Cross-link from sibling `handoff.json` if appropriate (optional — not blocking)

reference.pattern: Decision-archive doc following sibling discussion.md style
reference.examples: Match heading hierarchy, prose voice, and decision-log tone of sibling discussion.md

criteria: File contains all 7 question headers (`grep -c '^## Q[1-7]' file` returns 7)
No code changes — `git status packages/ docs/` shows no modifications

scope_boundary: OUT OF SCOPE: any code changes (this is doc-only); modifying sibling discussion.md (this task creates a NEW file); generating handoff.json updates

rationale.chosen_approach: Doc-only archive of grill-me decision tree as a separate sibling file (discussion-followup.md), not amendment to existing discussion.md, to preserve the original session as immutable record
alternatives_considered: Skip — decisions are already in plan files
decision_factors: Auditability — separate file = clear before/after grill
Discoverability — anyone reading the analysis folder finds both
Plan files don't capture rationale narratively
rationale.tradeoffs: Two files instead of one; grill-followup is a child concept (acceptable — discussion.md is the main session, follow-up is grilled refinement)

manual_checks: Eyeball the file — 7 sections, LOCKED markers prominent, prose tone matches sibling discussion.md
Run `grep -c '^## Q[1-7]' file` to confirm exactly 7 question headers
success_metrics: Reads cleanly to a human reviewer (Gemini diff review)
